title: [regression #113 build] Inverted full adder output when use -ha option.

features.name: packed_concatenation_lhs_addition_assignment
features.description: Code should include a packed concatenation assignment on the left-hand side with an addition expression on the right-hand side

features.name: extract_fa_ha_option
features.description: Code should include an extract_fa command with -ha option for full adder extraction from addition operations
